# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  status: string;
  age: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

// Helper to build KV keys dynamically from user input
function buildKey(parts: string[]): Deno.KvKey {
  return parts.filter((p) => p !== undefined && p !== null && p !== "");
}

// Seed some sample data for demonstration
async function seedData() {
  const users: User[] = [
    { id: "1", name: "Alice Johnson", email: "alice@example.com", role: "admin", department: "engineering", status: "active", age: 30, createdAt: "2024-01-15" },
    { id: "2", name: "Bob Smith", email: "bob@example.com", role: "developer", department: "engineering", status: "active", age: 25, createdAt: "2024-02-20" },
    { id: "3", name: "Carol Davis", email: "carol@example.com", role: "designer", department: "design", status: "active", age: 28, createdAt: "2024-03-10" },
    { id: "4", name: "Dave Wilson", email: "dave@example.com", role: "developer", department: "engineering", status: "inactive", age: 35, createdAt: "2024-01-25" },
    { id: "5", name: "Eve Brown", email: "eve@example.com", role: "manager", department: "design", status: "active", age: 40, createdAt: "2024-04-05" },
  ];

  for (const user of users) {
    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    // Primary key
    atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
    // Secondary indexes for efficient lookups
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department_role", user.department, user.role, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);
    await atomic.commit();
  }
}

// Search users with flexible filter criteria
async function searchUsers(filters: Record<string, string>): Promise<User[]> {
  const results: User[] = [];

  // Determine the most specific index to use based on provided filters
  let prefix: Deno.KvKey;

  if (filters.department && filters.role) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_department_role", filters.department, filters.role]);
  } else if (filters.role) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_role", filters.role]);
  } else if (filters.department) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_department", filters.department]);
  } else if (filters.status) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_status", filters.status]);
  } else if (filters.email) {
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users_by_email", filters.email]);
    if (entry.value) {
      return applyInMemoryFilters([entry.value], filters);
    }
    return [];
  } else if (filters.id) {
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", filters.id]);
    if (entry.value) {
      return applyInMemoryFilters([entry.value], filters);
    }
    return [];
  } else {
    prefix = ["users"];
  }

  const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    if (entry.value && typeof entry.value === "object" && "id" in entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
  }

  return applyInMemoryFilters(results, filters);
}

// Apply additional in-memory filters that weren't covered by the index
function applyInMemoryFilters(users: User[], filters: Record<string, string>): User[] {
  let filtered = [...users];

  if (filters.status) {
    filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.status === filters.status);
  }

  if (filters.name) {
    const nameLower = filters.name.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.name.toLowerCase().includes(nameLower));
  }

  if (filters.minAge) {
    const minAge = parseInt(filters.minAge);
    if (!isNaN(minAge)) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.age >= minAge);
    }
  }

  if (filters.maxAge) {
    const maxAge = parseInt(filters.maxAge);
    if (!isNaN(maxAge)) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.age <= maxAge);
    }
  }

  if (filters.createdAfter) {
    filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.createdAt >= filters.createdAfter);
  }

  if (filters.createdBefore) {
    filtered = filtered.filter((u) => u.createdAt <= filters.createdBefore);
  }

  // Sorting
  if (filters.sortBy) {
    const sortField = filters.sortBy as keyof User;
    const sortOrder = filters.sortOrder === "desc" ? -1 : 1;
    filtered.sort((a, b) => {
      const aVal = a[sortField];
      const bVal = b[sortField];
      if (typeof aVal === "string" && typeof bVal === "string") {
        return aVal.localeCompare(bVal) * sortOrder;
      }
      if (typeof aVal === "number" && typeof bVal === "number") {
        return (aVal - bVal) * sortOrder;
      }
      return 0;
    });
  }

  // Pagination
  const limit = filters.limit ? parseInt(filters.limit) : undefined;
  const offset = filters.offset ? parseInt(filters.offset) : 0;

  if (offset > 0) {
    filtered = filtered.slice(offset);
  }
  if (limit && limit > 0) {
    filtered = filtered.slice(0, limit);
  }

  return filtered;
}

// Create or update a user
async function createUser(userData: Partial<User>): Promise<User> {
  const id = userData.id || crypto.randomUUID();
  const user: User = {
    id,
    name: userData.name || "",
    email: userData.email || "",
    role: userData.role || "user",
    department: userData.department || "general",
    status: userData.status || "active",
    age: userData.age || 0,
    createdAt: userData.createdAt || new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
  };

  // Remove old indexes if updating
  const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  if (existing.value) {
    const old = existing.value;
    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    atomic.delete(["users_by_role", old.role, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department", old.department, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_status", old.status, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department_role", old.department, old.role, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_email", old.email]);
    await atomic.commit();
  }

  // Set new data and indexes
  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department_role", user.department, user.role, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);
  await atomic.commit();

  return user;
}

// Delete a user and all indexes
async function deleteUser(id: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  if (!entry.value) return false;

  const user = entry.value;
  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(["users", user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department_role", user.department, user.role, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_email", user.email]);
  await atomic.commit();

  return true;
}

// Dynamic KV key lookup - construct keys from path segments
async function dynamicLookup(segments: string[]): Promise<unknown[]> {
  const key = buildKey(segments);
  const results: unknown[] = [];

  // Try exact match first
  const exact = await kv.get(key);
  if (exact.value) {
    return [exact.value];
  }

  // Try prefix list
  const iter = kv.list({ prefix: key });
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    results.push({
      key: entry.key,
      value: entry.value,
    });
  }

  return results;
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(message: string, status = 400): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message, status }, status);
}

// Seed data on startup
await seedData();

serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  // Handle CORS preflight
  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  try {
    // GET / - API documentation
    if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
      return jsonResponse({
        name: "Edge Database API",
        version: "1.0.0",
        endpoints: {
          "GET /users": "Search users with flexible filters",
          "GET /users/:id": "Get a specific user by ID",
          "POST /users": "Create a new user",
          "PUT /users/:id": "Update an existing user",
          "DELETE /users/:id": "Delete a user",
          "GET /lookup/*": "Dynamic KV key lookup from path segments",
          "POST /seed": "Re-seed sample data",
        },
        searchParams: {
          filters: ["id", "name", "email", "role", "department", "status", "minAge", "maxAge", "createdAfter", "createdBefore"],
          pagination: ["limit", "offset"],
          sorting: ["sortBy", "sortOrder (asc|desc)"],
        },
        examples: [
          "/users?role=developer&status=active",
          "/users?department=engineering&minAge=25&maxAge=35",
          "/users?name=alice&sortBy=age&sortOrder=desc",
          "/users?department=engineering&role=developer&limit=10&offset=0",
          "/lookup/users_by_role/admin",
          "/lookup/users_by_department/engineering",
        ],
      });
    }

    // POST /seed - Re-seed data
    if (path === "/seed" && method === "POST") {
      await seedData();
      return jsonResponse({ message: "Sample data seeded successfully" });
    }

    // GET /users - Search with filters
    if (path === "/users" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams) {
        filters[key] = value;
      }

      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return jsonResponse({
        count: users.length,
        filters,
        results: users,
      });
    }

    // GET /users/:id - Get specific user
    const userIdMatch = path.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
    if (userIdMatch && method === "GET") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (!entry.value) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }
      return jsonResponse(entry.value);
    }

    // POST /users - Create user
    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json();
      if (!body.name || !body.email) {
        return errorResponse("name and email are required");
      }
      const user = await createUser(body);
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User created", user }, 201);
    }

    // PUT /users/:id - Update user
    if (userIdMatch && method === "PUT") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (!existing.value) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }
      const body = await req.json();
      const updated = await createUser({ ...existing.value, ...body, id: userId });
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User updated", user: updated });
    }

    // DELETE /users/:id - Delete user
    if (userIdMatch && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const deleted = await deleteUser(userId);
      if (!deleted) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User deleted", id: userId });
    }

    // GET /lookup/* - Dynamic KV key lookup
    if (path.startsWith("/lookup/") && method === "GET") {
      const segments = path.replace("/lookup/", "").split("/").filter(Boolean);
      if (segments.length === 0) {
        return errorResponse("Provide key segments in the URL path, e.g., /lookup/users/1");
      }
      const results = await dynamicLookup(segments);
      return jsonResponse({
        key: segments,
        count: results.length,
        results,
      });
    }

    // GET /keys - List available key prefixes
    if (path === "/keys" && method === "GET") {
      const prefixes = [
        "users",
        "users_by_role",
        "users_by_department",
        "users_by_status",
        "users_by_department_role",
        "users_by_email",
      ];

      const keyCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
      for (const prefix of prefixes) {
        let count = 0;
        const iter = kv.list({ prefix: [prefix] });
        for await (const _entry of iter) {
          count++;
        }
        keyCounts[prefix] = count;
      }

      return jsonResponse({
        indexes: keyCounts,
        usage: "Use /lookup/{prefix} to browse entries, or /lookup/{prefix}/{value} for filtered results",
      });
    }

    return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Error:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Internal server error";
    return errorResponse(message, 500);
  }
}, { port: 8000 });
